bed_mine.title: Use the bed mining technique at Y:8-22 in the Nether — beds explode there, exposing Ancient Debris efficiently

subtitle.text: Y:8-22. Beds explode in the Nether. That is a feature, not a flaw. Bring beds, not pickaxes.

description: CH.10 · THE DEBRIS FIELD
▸ Ancient Debris is the rarest ore by weight.
It spawns only in the Nether at Y:8-22.
The bed mining technique finds more per hour
than any other method.
Learn it once. Use it for all netherite farming.
◈ BED MINING TECHNIQUE
└ Strip mine at Y:15 in the Nether
└ Place a bed in a pocket 1 block ahead
└ Right-click bed: it detonates (beds explode in Nether)
└ Explosion radius exposes Ancient Debris
that would take 30+ seconds to pickaxe manually
└ Ancient Debris is blast-resistant — the explosion
destroys Netherrack but leaves Debris intact
└ Bring 64 beds. One per pocket.
◈ YIELD MATH
└ Ancient Debris spawns in blobs of 1-3
└ Average: 2-3 blobs per chunk at Y:15
└ One full netherite set: ~40 Debris → 40 Scrap →
10 Netherite Ingots (4 scrap + 4 gold each)
└ Upgrade diamond tools: 1 Ingot each
└ Budget: 80 Debris minimum for full set + tools
◈ CANONNUKES URANIUM OVERLAP
└ Alex's Caves Radioactive biome has radrock_uranium_ore
at similar Y levels in the Nether
└ If you pass through radioactive Nether terrain,
strip mine that zone too — uranium for the reactor
└ Hazmat armor recommended in radioactive biomes
(Cold Sweat interaction: heat + radiation stacks)
◈ SAFETY NOTES
└ Y:8-22 is lava lake territory
Fireproof potion: mandatory
└ Wither Skeleton patrol range: fortress proximity
Mine far from fortresses for cleaner runs
└ Bed explosion: does NOT damage the miner if placed
correctly in a pocket (stand back 2+ blocks)
▸ Netherite was forged at the start of the age.
The beds were an accident.
The technique was discovered by someone
who did not die from the first explosion.
That person deserves credit.
▶ Collect 20 Ancient Debris
▶ Use the bed mining technique [check]
◇ Fortune III does NOT increase Debris drop.
Debris always drops 1:1 regardless of enchant.
Use a Silk Touch pick for raw ore mining
if you prefer smelting over direct harvest.
